description.ko: AQUA-5는 바다의 가장 깊고 어두운 곳에 위치한 최첨단 심해 연구 기지입니다. 영원한 자정의 심연 속에서 등대처럼 빛나며, 미지의 해양 생물과 지열 에너지를 탐사하는 허브 역할을 합니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art deep-sea research station situated in the darkest depths of the ocean. It serves as a hub for exploring unknown marine life and geothermal energy, glowing like a beacon in the eternal midnight of the abyss.

prompt: High-tech underwater research station AQUA-5, located at the bottom of the Mariana Trench, glowing blue bioluminescent lights, massive pressurized glass domes, hydrothermal vents nearby, schools of translucent deep-sea fish, cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic, 8k resolution, dark and mysterious atmosphere.
